parameters.query: SELECT id AS "jobId", organization_id AS "organizationId", knowledge_source_id AS "knowledgeSourceId", source_record_id AS "sourceRecordId", retry_count AS "retryCount", state, error_message AS "errorMessage", failure_code AS "failureCode", failure_category AS "failureCategory", next_retry_at AS "nextRetryAt" FROM ingestion_jobs WHERE state IN ('failed', 'retrying') AND retry_count < 3 AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= NOW()) ORDER BY updated_at ASC LIMIT 50;

UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET state = 'queued', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_retry_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN (SELECT value::uuid FROM jsonb_array_elements_text('{{$json.retryableIdsJson}}'::jsonb) AS value) RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { retryableCount: $node["Classify Retry Metadata"].json.retryableCount || 0, blockedCount: $node["Classify Retry Metadata"].json.blockedCount || 0, requeued: true } }];
